headline: Salesforce FIFA Deal Puts Agentforce AI Workflows To The Test
summary: Salesforce (NYSE:CRM) has been named an Official Tournament Supporter for the FIFA World Cup 2026 and 2027. The multi year partnership will put Agentforce 360, Salesforce AI tools, and Slack at the center of tournament operations and fan engagement. The deal focuses on AI driven enterprise workflows across organizing bodies, partners, and fans during two of the world’s largest sporting events. For Salesforce, this partnership sits squarely in its core customer relationship and enterprise...
